pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly states 'You are an Industrial Engineer...'
Task description refers to a 'Tier-1 automotive parts supplier', assembly lines, and production data.
No mention of this value in any task files, scripts, or synthetic data. Appears to be fabricated flavor text.
Task requires using Oracle's MATCH_RECOGNIZE, which is the SQL Row Pattern Recognition feature.
Verified against task description instructions, verifier.py logic, and export_result.sh checks which mandate all four features.
Verified against task description and the check performed in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Oracle Database tables injected via setup_task.sh. It explicitly requires using Oracle's Row Pattern Recognition feature (MATCH_RECOGNIZE), along with ROLLUP, Materialized Views, and Stored Procedures. The requested output must be exported to /home/ga/pattern_summary.csv. The gdp_contribution claim is fabricated flavor text not found in the task data.
